---
title: "appendix"
author: "Sinping CHAN"
format: html
editor: visual


format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo       
    toc: true
    code-fold: true      # Allows readers to toggle code visibility
    embed-resources: true 
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true

execute:
  echo: false         
  warning: false
  message: false
---

### R code for data cleaning 

![](images/cleaning_code1.png)

![](images/cleaning_code2.png)

![](images/cleaning_code3.png)

### Correct my tone and english writing in Dataset Introduction sectiongit code for pushing, and check whether my writing is alligned to my code

![](images/correct_eng1.png)

![](images/correct_eng2.png)

![](images/correct_eng3.png)
